posts.author: Danielw (Daniel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dears,

I just started using monday.com tool for tracking project in my company and this is totally new for me. However I was wondering if I can use this tool for something more. I would be very grateful if someone can help me and tell if this what I’m wondering is possible to do within monday.
I wanted to create price road map for a few products together and if some products will have a the same price in the same time it can be somehow combined. Also question if it’s possible to show that one product price is dropping, other product increases or price is stable.
I don’t now if I have explained it correctly, but I’m adding simple example from excel sheet.

price road map840×216 31.7 KB
